core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Industrial Aesthetics with SaaS Precision
Content is King: Data must be legible at a glance (Mechanic mode)
Contrast: High contrast for dark environments (workshop)

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlays or carbon-fiber patterns for sidebar/headers to evoke the motorcycle theme.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous padding (p-6, p-8) for dashboard cards to avoid clutter.

sidebar.style: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full bg-zinc-950 border-r border-zinc-800 z-50

buttons.primary: bg-[#E31837] text-white hover:bg-[#C4122C] rounded-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-2 transition-all shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(227,24,55,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(227,24,55,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-700 rounded-sm font-medium px-6 py-2 border border-zinc-700

cards.base: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-sm p-6 backdrop-blur-sm relative overflow-hidden
cards.highlight: before:absolute before:top-0 before:left-0 before:w-full before:h-[2px] before:bg-[#E31837] before:opacity-0 hover:before:opacity-100 transition-all

inputs.base: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 focus:border-[#E31837] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E31837] rounded-sm h-10 px-3 text-sm text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 transition-all

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-sm px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

login.layout: Split screen. Left: 60% width with Red Motorcycle Image + Dark Overlay. Right: 40% width with Login Form.
login.elements: Logo centered, 'Bienvenido a Yepez Controls', minimalist form.

dashboard_admin.header: Must display date prominently: 'LUN 09 MARZO 2026' in Barlow Condensed font.

mechanic_view.style: High contrast, large touch targets (for gloved hands).
mechanic_view.elements: Task Queue, Progress Slider (0-100%), Parts Request Button.

client_portal.elements: Search by Plate (Big Input), Timeline Status (Received -> Diagnosis -> Repair -> Ready).

assets.icons: Lucide React (Bike, Wrench, Settings, Users, BarChart3, Search, LogOut)

universal_guidelines: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to give that mechanical/industrial look.
Primary Red (#E31837) should be used sparingly for CTAs and active states, not for large backgrounds.
All dates must follow the format: 'DAY DD MONTH YYYY' (e.g., LUN 09 MARZO 2026).
Do not use gradients for text.
